chapter_title: About the Voluntary Prayer of Asr Prayer

hadith_entries.text:
590. Narrated Ali : The Prophet * used to perform
four (voluntary) raka'as before asr prayer separating
between them by reciting Al-Tasleem's on the chosen
angels, and those who followed them of the Muslims and
the believers.' (At-Termizi)
15 At-Tasleem (ending the prayer) here means At-Tashahhod
(the last part of prayer before At-Tasleem). This means that the
four voluntary raka'as are performed without the first Tashahhod.
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
said: “May ﷺ Narrated Ibn Omar : The Prophet .591
Allah show mercy on him who performed four raka'as
before asr prayer.” (At-Termizi)
